title: crotalaria sandoorensis
intro: Crotalaria sandoorensis, also known as the Sandoor crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria sandoorensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
